title: RULES CLARIFICATION (organizers, Jun-23): <=30 valid orders in a scored stage => 0 pts on Drawdown AND Sharpe; sitting out HURTS score
source: Organizers announcement relayed by CEO 2026-06-23 (live R2)
why: Organizers clarified: "no trade does NOT equal a perfect score." If you do not generate MORE THAN 30 valid orders in a (scored) stage, the system cannot compute Max Drawdown and Sharpe for that stage -> you get 0 points for BOTH metrics (the 15% DrawdownRank + 10% SharpeRank of the Sec.11 composite = 25% of score zeroed). Sitting out / flat does NOT yield a better or perfect score; it forfeits the risk-discipline-adjacent points. Message literally references "Stage 3" but the >30-order floor must be treated as applying to every scored stage (R1/R2/R3 + final) until org confirms scope. Strengthens the earlier Sec.12 "<8 obs caps Sharpe Rank at 50" note into a hard ZERO below the order floor.
value_rationale: Directly governs 25% of the Sec.11 score and refutes any flatten-to-flat survival option; load-bearing for live posture every remaining round.
scope: CONSEQUENCE 1: The flatten-to-flat survival tactic is now strictly dominated in any scored stage - going flat zeros 25% of the composite. Confirms ACTIVE trading posture (barbell) over passive survival.

CONSEQUENCE 2: Each scored stage MUST clear >30 VALID orders. ACTION: verify our live order count per stage (survival book FX/metals rebalances + Stage-2 BTC scalper). As of Jun-23 the BTC long-scalper alone did 26 deals today + FX rebalances -> likely clears, but VERIFY per-stage and never let a stage end with <=30.

CONSEQUENCE 3: Re-derive whether the survival book in isolation (low-turnover FX/metal rebalancer) clears >30 orders/stage on its own; if not, the Stage-2 scalper order flow is now SCORE-LOAD-BEARING, not just a return bet.
OPEN: confirm with org whether "Stage 3" = Round 3 only or all scored stages, and exact definition of "valid order".
recommendation: Treat >30 valid orders/scored-stage as a HARD operational floor. Never flatten-to-flat for a full scored stage. Verify per-stage order counts from MT5 history_deals_get; alert if a stage trends toward <=30.

history.reason: Organizer rules clarification relayed during live R2; recorded per CLAUDE.md mandate to log load-bearing decisions at the moment they happen.

Per-round order count verified vs MT5 history_orders_get (Jun-23 ~12:30 BST, R2 still open ~9.5h): R1=285 order submissions (SAFE; SOL 198/ETH 51/BTC 17 — SOL-heavy scalping). R2=ONLY 29 order submissions / 31 position-opens (BORDERLINE/BELOW the >30 floor; now ~all BTC=25). R3 not started. Order generation COLLAPSED R1->R2 (285->29). RISK: if the scalper stalls, R2 (and any scored stage) could end <=30 -> zero DrawdownRank+SharpeRank. Caveats: (a) round windows bucketed in system-UTC but deal ts are broker server-time (~+1h) so edge deals may misbucket; (b) "valid order" definition unconfirmed (submissions 29 vs position-opens 31 straddle the boundary); (c) org said "Stage 3" specifically — scope vs all rounds unconfirmed. ACTION: confirm scalper keeps firing through each round close; clarify Stage-3 scope + valid-order definition with org.
